On a mobile phone, the prompt has been filled in with "quality skateboard gear," and they are ready to hit the "Generate themes" button.
A Wordpress editor is open and products are being added to the site.
A HP barcode scanner with a red light.
On the POS, there is a modal where a subscription is being added for a skate magazine.
There's a modal where items, skateboards in this example, can be added and subtracted based on the inventory count.
On the POS, the smart grid, lock screen, receipt, and customer display are being edited.
The Uber Direct app icon sits on the interface of a package of skateboard bearings being delivered in San Francisco.
An interface is shown where a user can select who to send SMS messages and what the message will say. Next to that interface is a phone with the SMS message.
A Shopify Form is being translated from English to French and a module shows what that form looks like in French.
A search window is open where the user searched for "win back" and multiple options are shown as potential options.
A Buy with Shop button is shown and it expands to include the Mastercard logo and the last for digits of a card.
The quick sale button is tapped with three products selected, a checkout screen appears, and once the user confirms, a receipt of the transaction is shown.
An Apple Watch with the redesigned Shopify app that shows the total sales and the total sessions.
A section at the top of the Shop app shows exclusive offers.
Shoes from Japan, Germany, and England are shown as options for Shopify Collective.
The option to pay by ACH by linking a bank account is shown below the other payment options.
A search bar shows a supplier looking for skateboards to sell.
A hat, t-shirt, and skateboard are paired with their payments.
The animation starts with an application for funding, then there's a request to withdraw money, and finally the money is withdrawn.
An interface shows a breakdown of a payout into sales tax, marketing, inventory, and savings.
A credit card is shown with an interface that breaks down the staff cards by department.
A Fedex return label is paired with the shipping interface that shows the creation of a return label.
The shipping interface shows the default packaging options for each product.
A Sidekick prompt where the user asked about review apps and received recommendations.
A Sidekick prompt where the user asked for the highest converting subject lines and Sidekick pulls the results.
An interface is shown where a user can add a product with a title, description, and media.
Multiple code editors where the developer is running a bulk import.
A code editor is paired with a search bar where the user searched for a date.
A visual editor is shown where the user is training ML collaboratively.
A code editor shows the developer using the POS Extensions Storage API.

A sidekick prompt to show high value products from the past three months, and brings up a graph of best selling products.
A sidekick prompt to show customers subscribed to marketing who have made no purchases brings up a filtered list of customers.
A photo of a skateboard on the floor beneath a Sidekick prompt to put the skateboard in someone's hand. The photo turns into a person holding the skateboard.
Three merchant products appear under a Sidekick prompt saying 'Create a bestsellers collection with a discount'. The three products are added to a bestsellers collection with a 15% discount.
A Sidekick logo in a mobile device pulses as it speaks
On a mobile phone, the prompt has been filled in with "quality skateboard gear," and they are ready to hit the "Generate themes" button.
A Wordpress editor is open and products are being added to the site.
A HP barcode scanner with a red light.
On the POS, there is a modal where a subscription is being added for a skate magazine.
There's a modal where items, skateboards in this example, can be added and subtracted based on the inventory count.
On the POS, the smart grid, lock screen, receipt, and customer display are being edited.
The Uber Direct app icon sits on the interface of a package of skateboard bearings being delivered in San Francisco.
An interface is shown where a user can select who to send SMS messages and what the message will say. Next to that interface is a phone with the SMS message.
A Shopify Form is being translated from English to French and a module shows what that form looks like in French.
A search window is open where the user searched for "win back" and multiple options are shown as potential options.
A Buy with Shop button is shown and it expands to include the Mastercard logo and the last for digits of a card.
The quick sale button is tapped with three products selected, a checkout screen appears, and once the user confirms, a receipt of the transaction is shown.
An Apple Watch with the redesigned Shopify app that shows the total sales and the total sessions.
A section at the top of the Shop app shows exclusive offers.
Shoes from Japan, Germany, and England are shown as options for Shopify Collective.
The option to pay by ACH by linking a bank account is shown below the other payment options.
A search bar shows a supplier looking for skateboards to sell.
A hat, t-shirt, and skateboard are paired with their payments.
The animation starts with an application for funding, then there's a request to withdraw money, and finally the money is withdrawn.
A Fedex return label is paired with the shipping interface that shows the creation of a return label.
The shipping interface shows the default packaging options for each product.
A Sidekick prompt where the user asked about review apps and received recommendations.
A Sidekick prompt where the user asked for the highest converting subject lines and Sidekick pulls the results.
An interface is shown where a user can add a product with a title, description, and media.
Multiple code editors where the developer is running a bulk import.
A code editor is paired with a search bar where the user searched for a date.
A visual editor is shown where the user is training ML collaboratively.
A code editor shows the developer using the POS Extensions Storage API.
